site.name: Spain 24/7
site.tagline: Tools for foreign property owners in Spain

hero.title: Own a home in Spain? Here is the easy part.
hero.sub: Calculate your taxes, audit your costs, and stay on top of your Spanish property in minutes. No Spanish required.

tools.heading: Three tools. Built for your Spanish property.
tools.sub: Made by people who own property in Spain. Free, accurate, and clear.

tax.title: Modelo 210 Tax Calculator
tax.desc: Work out your non-resident property tax in under two minutes. Get a clear, personalised breakdown.

cost.title: Property Cost Audit
cost.desc: See what your Spanish home really costs you each year. Find hidden fees and easy savings.

rental.title: Rental Income Tax
rental.desc: Work out the tax on your Spanish rental income, quarter by quarter. Built for non-residents.

why.heading: Why we built these tools
why.body: Owning a home in Spain should feel like a holiday, not a paperwork project. Spanish-only websites, confusing tax forms, and hidden fees waste your time and your money. These tools give you clear answers in your own language so you can make confident decisions about your property.

footer.tagline: Tools for foreign property owners in Spain

bueno_cta.tax_body: We can file your Modelo 210 for you, in your language, with real human support. Transparent fees. No surprises.
